{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220549148018F89E65FB1E93D2D9"}"},"total":139},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566101223117275928","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，前期普通人不知道外挂和果实到中期实力强大明白果实能力和外挂以及坚定信念觉醒霸王色霸气，前期的主角很符合我对于普通人的认知，无论是理念还是体格，单纯就是想活命那种，那种能帮帮，帮不了不帮的感觉，对于海贼都处理方法也很恰到好处，可以说我看海贼和海贼同人中处理的最好的，要不就偏向海贼，要不就偏向海军，多少有些偏颇，中期看见花船黑暗一面后（也不和尚）也有了觉悟，也没啥好说的和前面恶差不多，剧情节奏稍微快一点，还有就是前期真的挺弱，可能会劝退很多人，但是打不过绝对跑的过","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":7,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741297541E93D2D9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227566101223117275928%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546646170882296894%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761622988,"group_id":"7546646170882296894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"ID弟弟看看封口费快发快发矿务局我背后苏俄v我就不放假嗯兄弟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/rF+4fyJIMoQDcm5uPanu0w1i7sdRw7iL7PTBdfnvuT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1673beeba86144fa93b0a6b327a43f84~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704424&x-signature=Yl3A0QfX3KkxV1rCWoFQlMvYoMg%3D","user_id":"2198672011429438","user_name":"用莎普爱思的砂糖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2198672011429438","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546646170882296894","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到海贼世界之中的人都知道，在这个世界，最大的外挂不是系统、不是三色霸气、不是恶魔果实，而是海贼世界原住民的强大身体。
文生穿越而来，可他是肉身穿越，瞬间失去了这个最强外挂，就连偷吃的恶魔果实都没有什么攻击力。
幸运的是，他有外挂！
